def eligible_for_heating_assistance(self) -> bool:
        valid_genders = get_valid_values('genders')
        valid_races = get_valid_values('races')
        valid_employment_statuses = get_valid_values('employment_statuses')
        valid_educations = get_valid_values('educations')
        valid_marital_statuses = get_valid_values('marital_statuses')
        valid_religions = get_valid_values('religions')

        if (self.gender.lower() not in valid_genders or
                self.race.lower() not in valid_races or
                self.employment_status.lower() not in valid_employment_statuses or
                self.education.lower() not in valid_educations or
                self.marital_status.lower() not in valid_marital_statuses or
                self.religion.lower() not in valid_religions):
            return False

        if not (18 <= self.age <= 100) or not (12000 <= self.annual_income <= 25000) or not (2 <= self.household_size <= 6):
            return False

        return True
